label: Capital Markets & Institutions Ontology
notes: Volume XI pack (ADR-0014) for the capital-formation side of the VC / CU / fintech / innovation stack. Enriches the innovation-finance institution types (VC/PE/private-credit/investment & merchant banks, fintech/neobank/broker-dealer/RIA, funds/SPVs/holding cos), the capital_markets instruments and events (equity, preferred, SAFE, convertible, warrant, senior/mezz/sub debt, private credit, warehouse, participation, syndication, fund/SPV vehicles, capital_call, distribution, exit, IPO, recap, acquisition, disposition), the investments family (portfolio/holding/position/security and asset classes), and investor people (investor/LP/GP/advisor/PM/financial_advisor). Relationship targets are catalog schema_refs (closed graph). Connector keys are forward references into the Connector Registry (Volume IX); required_document and KPI keys are free-form. Anchors (VC/PE firm, investment bank, fintech, priced equity, SAFE, convertible note, fund vehicle, capital_call, exit, IPO, acquisition, investment record) hand-authored in full; the long tail is drafted on the same schema.

ontologies.label: Venture Capital Firm
ontologies.notes: Manages one or more VC funds; raises from LPs, invests equity into startups, supports and exits.

relationships.description: GP of the fund vehicles it raises.
Exempt reporting adviser / RIA depending on AUM.

ontologies.label: Private Equity Firm
ontologies.notes: Buyout/growth manager; control or significant-minority equity, value creation, leveraged exits.

ontologies.label: Investment Bank
ontologies.notes: Advises on and underwrites capital-markets transactions; arranges syndications, M&A, IPOs.

ontologies.label: Private Credit Fund
ontologies.notes: Non-bank lender deploying LP capital into direct-lending facilities; the credit analogue to a VC/PE fund.

ontologies.label: Fintech
ontologies.notes: Technology company delivering financial products/infrastructure; a core Cooperative Markets innovation-company type.

relationships.description: Sells into / integrates with institutions (Cooperative Markets).

ontologies.label: Fund (Institution)
ontologies.notes: The fund as a legal institution/entity (vs. capital_markets:fund the vehicle-instrument and investments:fund the holding record).

ontologies.label: Equity (Common Stock)
ontologies.notes: Common ownership issued in a priced financing round; the base security of a startup cap table.

relationships.description: Reg D exemption / Form D filing.

ontologies.label: Preferred Equity
ontologies.notes: Preferred stock with liquidation preference, anti-dilution, and control terms; the standard VC instrument.

ontologies.label: Convertible Note
ontologies.notes: Debt that converts to equity at a priced round; carries interest, discount, and valuation cap.

ontologies.label: SAFE (Simple Agreement for Future Equity)
ontologies.notes: Non-debt right to future equity on a trigger event; post-money or pre-money, cap and/or discount.

ontologies.label: Fund (Vehicle Instrument)
ontologies.notes: The pooled fund vehicle as a capital-markets instrument LPs subscribe to (vs. institutions:fund the entity, investments:fund the holding record).

ontologies.label: Fund Holding (Investment Record)
ontologies.notes: A fund position held within a portfolio (vs. capital_markets:fund the vehicle and institutions:fund the entity).
